question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many patients who were female got white blood cells that were below 3.5? female refers to SEX = 'F'; white blood cells that were below 3.5 refers to WBC < 3.5
orig_masked: How many [T3] who were [C64] got [C57] that were below [V1]? [C64] refers to [C64] = '[V2]'; [C57] that were below [V1] refers to [C57] < [V1]; [V1] is a value of the column [C57]; [V2] is a value of the column [C64]
orig_evidence: female refers to SEX = 'F'; white blood cells that were below 3.5 refers to WBC < 3.5
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.WBC < 3.5 AND T1.SEX = 'F'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Was the patient with the number 57266's uric acid within a normal range? uric acid within a normal range refers to UA > 8.0 and SEX = 'M'OR UA > 6.5 and SEX = 'F'
orig_masked: Was the [T3] with the [C63] [V1]'s [C55]? [C55] refers to [C55] > [V3] and [C64] = '[V5]'OR [C55] > [V2] and [C64] = '[V4]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C63]; [V2] is a value of the column [C55]; [V3] is a value of the column [C55]; [V4] is a value of the column [C64]; [V5] is a value of the column [C64]
orig_evidence: uric acid within a normal range refers to UA > 8.0 and SEX = 'M'OR UA > 6.5 and SEX = 'F'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.UA > 6.5) OR (T1.SEX = 'M' AND T2.UA > 8.0) THEN true ELSE false END FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID = 57266

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: When is the birthday of the oldest patient whose blood glucose is abnormal? oldest patient refers to MIN(Birthday); blood glucose is abnormal refers to GLU > 180;
orig_masked: When is the [C59] of the [C59] [T3] whose [C27] is [C27]? [C59] [T3] refers to MIN([C59]); [C27] is [C27] refers to [C27] > [V1];; [V1] is a value of the column [C27]
orig_evidence: oldest patient refers to MIN(Birthday); blood glucose is abnormal refers to GLU > 180;
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GLU > 180 ORDER BY T1.Birthday ASC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What was the build up play speed class for "Willem II" on 2011/2/22? "Willem II" refers to team_long_name = 'Willem II'; on 2011/2/22 refers to date = '2012-02-22'
orig_masked: What was the [C181] for "[V2]" on [V3]? "[V2]" refers to [C173] = '[V2]'; on [V3] refers to [C189] = '[V1]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C189]; [V2] is a value of the column [C173]; [V3] is a value of the column [C189]
orig_evidence: "Willem II" refers to team_long_name = 'Willem II'; on 2011/2/22 refers to date = '2012-02-22'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t2.buildUpPlaySpeedClass FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t1.team_long_name = 'Willem II' AND SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 10) = '2011-02-22'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Please list the name of the districts with accounts that made withdrawal transactions.  A2 refers to district name; type = 'VYDAJ' stands for withdrawal transactions
orig_masked: Please list the [C24] of the [T5] with [T1] that made [C55] [T8].  [C24] refers to [T5] [C24]; [C55] = '[V1]' stands for [C55] [T8]; [V1] is a value of the column [C55]
orig_evidence: A2 refers to district name; type = 'VYDAJ' stands for withdrawal transactions
orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.A2 FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.type = 'VYDAJ'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Among the accounts who have loan validity more than 24 months, list out the accounts that have the lowest approved amount and have account opening date before 1997.
orig_masked: Among the [T1] who have [C36] more than [V1], list out the [T1] that have the lowest [C34] and have [T1] [C2] before [V2]. ; [V1] is a value of the column [C36]; [V2] is a value of the column [C2]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.account_id FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.duration > 24 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) < '1997' ORDER BY T1.amount ASC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Please list the accounts whose district is Tabor that are eligible for loans.  District refers to column A2; when the account type = 'OWNER', it's eligible for loans
orig_masked: Please list the [T1] whose [T5] is [V2] that are [C16].  [T5] refers to column [C24]; when the [C16] = '[V1]', it's [C16]; [V1] is a value of the column [C16]; [V2] is a value of the column [C24]
orig_evidence: District refers to column A2; when the account type = 'OWNER', it's eligible for loans
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.account_id FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.type = 'OWNER' AND T1.A2 = 'Tabor'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many male patients are are with creatinine index out of the normal range? creatinine (CRE) out of the normal range refers to CRE > = 1.5; Male refers to Sex = 'M'
orig_masked: How many male [T3] are are with [C21]? [C21] refers to [C21] > = [V1]; Male refers to [C64] = '[V2]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C21]; [V2] is a value of the column [C64]
orig_evidence: creatinine (CRE) out of the normal range refers to CRE > = 1.5; Male refers to Sex = 'M'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.CRE >= 1.5 AND T1.SEX = 'M'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: For all patient born in 1982, state if their albumin is within normal range. Year(Birthday) = '1982'; albumin is within normal range refers to ALB between 3.5 and 5.5
orig_masked: For all [T3] [C59] in [V1], state if their [C14] is [C14]. Year([C59]) = '[V1]'; [C14] is [C14] refers to [C14] between [V2] and [V3]; [V1] is a value of the column [C59]; [V2] is a value of the column [C14]; [V3] is a value of the column [C14]
orig_evidence: Year(Birthday) = '1982'; albumin is within normal range refers to ALB between 3.5 and 5.5
orig_gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN T2.ALB >= 3.5 AND T2.ALB <= 5.5 THEN 'normal' ELSE 'abnormal' END FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) = '1982'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the highest overall rating received by Dorlan Pabon? Dorlan Pabon refers to T2.player_name = 'Dorlan Pabon'; highest overall rating refers to MAX(overall_rating)
orig_masked: What is the highest [C153] received by [V1]? [V1] refers to T2.[C126] = '[V1]'; highest [C153] refers to MAX([C153]); [V1] is a value of the column [C126]
orig_evidence: Dorlan Pabon refers to T2.player_name = 'Dorlan Pabon'; highest overall rating refers to MAX(overall_rating)
orig_gold_sql: SELECT MAX(t2.overall_rating) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Dorlan Pabon'
